ExecutePrompt.Detail: Service.Execute has a wired dispatch path for this harness

ModelDiscovery.Detail: models are discovered from direct PTY TUI evidence or documented CLI help

ModelPinning.Detail: registry marks exact model pinning as supported

WorkdirContext.Detail: no explicit workdir/context support is registered

ReasoningLevels.Detail: reasoning levels are validated against harness CLI evidence before execution

UsageCapture.Detail: usage capture is best-effort and reported on final events when available

FinalText.Detail: final events include normalized final_text when response text is available

ToolEvents.Detail: Service.Execute emits tool_call and tool_result events

QuotaStatus.Detail: subscription quota can be probed or read from a cache

RecordReplay.Detail: direct PTY discovery and quota probes produce replayable sanitized cassettes
